title: Miami Heat Wave
lead: Miami is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.14. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Miami has brought temperatures to extremely high levels, with a score of 10.0/10 indicating a severe anomaly. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 10.0 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, showing the intense heat. 
 The relative humidity is at 65%, with a wind speed of 11.3 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
